item.dmnr.mana_cake.description: A cake to eat endlessly with mana consumption.
item.dmnr.weather_fairy_staff.lore:
Born of winds and skies together,
this relic will change the weather.
item.dmnr.key_of_homestead.lore:
A silent key, a hidden door,
A path that leads to home once more.
One simple click, the world will bend.
Then off you go, your roads extend.
item.dmnr.key_of_homestead.no_return: There is nowhere to go back to.
item.dmnr.key_of_homestead.remove: §4Shift + RightClick to delete your return point§r - §2 LeftClick on Block to cancel§r
item.dmnr.the_clickers_cookie.lore:
Baked when grandmas ruled forever,
In that strange apocalypse endeavor.
It gleams with fate you can’t outwit,
One single click… you’re part of it.
item.dmnr.battle_mage_ring.lore_1:
Forged in ancient days,
To bind two paths in equal ways.
Let muscle guide the arcane stream,
And turn raw power into dream.
item.dmnr.battle_mage_ring.lore_2: (All magical damage is affected by the User's Strength value. Tip: Wielding a sword in the main hand boosts Strength)
item.dmnr.amulet_of_hellfire.description: Your spells mark enemies with Hellfire, an infernal blaze that burns hotter than mortal flame, counts as magic, and ignores all resistance.
tooltip.dmnr.faction_amulet: Prevents raids and faction attacks until you strike first and declare war.
tooltip.dmnr.glass_cannon_belt: Doubles all incoming and outgoing damage.
tooltip.dmnr.sturdy_belt: Halves all incoming and outgoing damage.
item.dmnr.disappearing_tiara.description: Let's see, if you can see... when I sneak.
item.dmnr.brimstone_coal.description: Endless fuel that is not consumed (Not guaranteed to be compatible with every mod)
item.dmnr.voidfeather_charm.description: Saves you from the void and returns you to your bed.
tooltip.dmnr.angel_ring: Grants the ability of flying (can be toggled with "Disabled DM&R Fly"-button). And protects you from kinetic energy
tooltip.dmnr.fallen_angel_ring: Mist Form will be toggleable when cast as a spell and increasing its flight speed!
tooltip.dmnr.devil_ring: Converts all fire spells into hellfire spells.
tooltip.dmnr.curse_protection_amulet: Shields the wearer from short-lived negative potion effects and the Curse Shape.
tooltip.dmnr.bracelet_of_water: Grants the wearer the ability to breathe underwater, swim with increasing speed as the item’s power grows, and see clearly beneath the waves.
item.dmnr.projectile_reflection_ring.des: Reflects up to three projectiles that would hit the wielder. Recharges over time.
item.dmnr.ocelot_ring.description:
Accelerates your movement speed and adds a fall damage reduction.
 The Boost increases after 5 seconds of running.
item.dmnr.fire_resistance_bracelet.descr: Grants immunity to fire and explosions, and allows to see clearly in lava
item.dmnr.defense_bracelet.description: Grants bonus armor and armor toughness.
item.dmnr.hydra_crown.description: Grants increasing beneficial effects the lower your health becomes.
Increases the number of ring slots.
item.dmnr.night_goggles.description: Grants Night Vision and prevents Blindness and Confusion. Removing the glasses causes slight dizziness.
item.dmnr.potion_of_infinity.description: An endless potion — never runs dry.
death.attack.dmnr_hellfire: %s was burned by the fires of hell!
death.attack.dmnr_hellfire.item: %s was burned by the fires of hell
death.attack.dmnr_hellfire.player: %s was burned with the fires of hell by %s
death.attack.dmnr_force.player: %s was crushed by the sheer force of %s
death.attack.dmnr_revenge.player: %s was punished for his actions by %s
dmnr.ring_of_spell_storing.no_ring.error: You need a §eBracelet of Spell Storing§r to use this key.
This item does not support channeled spells. Only instant spells can be used.
dmnr.shapes.atmark.nomark.error: I need a Rune of Marking in my other hand or need to set a player mark with a Mark-Spell to use this spell.
dmnr.shapes.atmark.noworld.error: I didn't specify a word for this charm.
dmnr.shapes.atmark.toweak.error: I'm not strong for dimensional travels. I need Magnitude 5 and Range 5.
dmnr.shapes.curse.no_charm.error: I need a Player Charm in my other hand to use this spell.
dmnr.shapes.curse.no_target.error: The selected Player does not exist.
dmnr.shapes.curse.too_far.error: The selected Player is to far away.
dmnr.shapes.curse.protection.error: The selected Player protects itself against your Magic.
dmnr.shapes.friends.no_bracelet_of_frien: I need a Bracelet of Friendship to use this spell
dmnr.ritual.output.dragonmagearmorritual: You must be wearing a full set of faction armor to perform this ritual.
You must be level 75 in order to perform this ritual.
dmnr.ritual.output.secondchanceritual.mi: There's no place I could go back to.
dmnr.feedback.weather.not_changable: There is no weather in this region!
tooltip.dmnr.ring_of_power.tooltip.one: One Ring to surpass them all!
tooltip.dmnr.ring_of_power.tooltip.two: One Ring that increases each of its upgrades by 1!
tooltip.dmnr.ring_of_ruling.tooltip.one: One Ring to rule them all!
tooltip.dmnr.ring_of_ruling.tooltip.two: One Ring to use upgrades without a Dragon Magic Armor!
dmnr:shapes/friends.desc.range: The Radius in which my friends will be affected
dmnr:shapes/atmark.desc.radius: The radius of the mark's impact.
dmnr:shapes/atmark.desc.range: The maximum distance that the spell can be casted. Each point raises the cap by 500 blocks.
dmnr:shapes/curse.desc.range: Times 20 = The maximum distance that the target can be.
dmnr:shapes/true_touch.desc.precision: Reverses the polarity of touch/self when crouching.
dmnr:shapes/true_touch.desc.radius: Applies a radius to the touch. When targeting blocks on the side, this center will be shifted so it only goes down one block, the rest will go up, allowing easy tunnels.
dmnr:components/sunrise.desc.delay: A delay in seconds before applying this component.
dmnr:components/moonrise.desc.delay: A delay in seconds before applying this component.
dmnr:components/banishrain.desc.delay: A delay in seconds before applying this component.
dmnr:components/conjurestorm.desc.delay: A delay in seconds before applying this component.
dmnr:components/conjurestorm.desc.magnit: Turns the rain into a storm.
dmnr:components/sorcerers_pride.desc.del: A delay in seconds before applying this component.
dmnr:components/sorcerers_pride.desc.dur: The duration of the Sorcerers Pride.
dmnr:components/sorcerers_pride.desc.mag: The level of the Sorcerers Pride.
dmnr:components/hellfire.desc.delay: A delay in seconds before applying this component.
dmnr:components/conjurewater.desc.delay: A delay in seconds before applying this component.
dmnr:components/conjurewater.desc.magnit: Defies the hellish heat (can be deactivated via Config!)
dmnr:components/conjurelava.desc.delay: A delay in seconds before applying this component.
dmnr:components/saturate.desc.delay: A delay in seconds before applying this component.
dmnr:components/saturate.desc.magnitude: Number of hunger bars (and saturation) that are filled.
dmnr:components/mark.desc.delay: A delay in seconds before applying this component.
dmnr:components/forcedamage.desc.delay: A delay in seconds before applying this component.
dmnr:components/forcedamage.desc.damage: The damage dealt to affected targets.
dmnr:components/forcedamage.desc.magnitu: Decreases the factor that the armor absorbs, to a point that an opponent with stronger armor takes more damage.
dmnr:components/alternativerecall.desc.d: A delay in seconds before applying this component.
dmnr:components/alternativerecall.desc.r: The maximum distance that can be recalled. Each point raises the cap by 1.000 blocks. At Max Level, the range is unlimited.
dmnr:components/alternativerecall.desc.p: If 1, the caster teleports to the spell location.
dmnr:components/alternativerecall.desc.m: How strong the target of the spell can be. 1 point = 20 HP.
dmnr:rituals/dragon_mage_ritual: Ritual of the Dragon Mage Armor
dmnr.key.use_spell_storing_ring: DM&R: Use Bracelet of Spell Storing
dmnr.key.output.disabledfly.true: The Dragon Mage Armor fly has been activated
dmnr.key.output.disabledfly.false: The Dragon Mage Armor fly has been disabled
